task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rocket.Chat main workspace or home screen is visible, indicating the agent has moved past the login screen.

task_completion.description: Agent navigated to the Permissions settings in Rocket.Chat
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Administration panel is open and the 'Permissions' page is visible, showing a grid or list of permissions and roles.
The 'mention-all' permission row is visible on the screen, possibly found via the search bar or scrolling.

task_completion.description: Agent created or opened the required audit text file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (like gedit, nano, or vim) or terminal is open, showing the file path '~/mention_all_audit.txt' or '/home/ga/mention_all_audit.txt'.

task_completion.description: Agent documented the correct roles in the audit file
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file contains a list of roles. These roles must exactly match the columns that have checked boxes for the 'mention-all' permission in the Rocket.Chat GUI.

integrity.description: Agent used the Rocket.Chat web interface to check permissions
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the agent actively viewing the Rocket.Chat Permissions page in a web browser, rather than using terminal commands or API scripts to fetch the data.

integrity.description: Agent did not change any permissions
integrity.visual_evidence: Checkboxes for the 'mention-all' permission (or any other permission) should only be viewed, not toggled. There should be no 'Save' button clicked or 'Changes saved' notifications visible.

integrity.description: The documented roles match the visual evidence from the GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: The roles written in the text file must correspond exactly to the checked boxes seen in the GUI screenshots, proving the agent didn't guess or hardcode the answer.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file path is strictly verified to be '/home/ga/mention_all_audit.txt'. The 'mention-all' permission is dynamically assigned to the 'admin' role plus 1-2 additional random roles (from user, bot, guest, anonymous, app). The VLM must verify that the roles documented in the text file exactly match the roles that have the 'mention-all' checkbox checked in the Rocket.Chat GUI screenshots.
